task: Add per-session analytics JSON report generation triggered on agent session exit, with email metadata threading through the analytics pipeline and session-scoped reporting via generateSessionReport.

component_scope.label: XL
component_scope.affected: BaseAgentAdapter, analytics/index (runAnalytics), analytics/report/session-report, analytics/report/payload-builder, analytics/report/report-generator, analytics/report/types

technical_risk.label: M
technical_risk.risk_factors: XSS defense via unicode escaping in inline-script HTML injection, non-fatal error swallowing in session finalization path, dynamic import of report module for lazy loading, fallback path logic for unwritable volumes
technical_risk.mitigation: Errors caught and logged as warnings (non-fatal); HTML escaping applied before payload embedding; writeReportWithFallback provides home/tmp fallback chain

key_reasoning.reason: BaseAgentAdapter is the core shared base class inherited by every agent adapter in the codebase; modifying it to add maybeWriteSessionReport() has blast-radius impact even though the change is non-fatal and gated. The feature also introduces a new analytics/report/ subpackage (4 new implementation files) and wires it through the analytics CLI command. Red flag applied: touches core shared utility.

11 files total from diffstat places this firmly in the XL (11-15 files) band: 2 modified existing files (BaseAgentAdapter.ts, analytics/index.ts) plus 9 new files spanning implementation (4) and tests (5).

red_flags_applied: Component Scope bumped from L (4) to XL (5): BaseAgentAdapter is the shared core base class for all agent adapters — touching it triggers the 'core shared utilities' red flag
